question_text: Which of the following correctly shows the symbol for a variable resistor (rheostat) in a circuit diagram?

options.label: A
options.text: A rectangle with an arrow pointing through it at an angle

options.label: C
options.text: A circle with an X inside

explanation: The standard circuit diagram symbol for a variable resistor (rheostat) is a rectangle with an arrow pointing diagonally through it, showing that resistance can be changed.
